```json
{
  "skill_id": "register-detection",
  "name": "Arabic Register & Dialect Detection",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Automated heuristics for identifying Modern Standard Arabic (MSA), Educated Spoken Arabic (ESA), and various dialectal registers (Masri, Khaleeji, Shami, Maghrebi).",
  "locales": ["ar"],
  "commands": ["/SCAN register", "/CHECK dialect purity"],
  "agents": ["arabic-content-master", "localization-lead"],
  "protocols": [
    "Head Term Analysis: Identifying common MSA connectors (على الرغم من، بالإضافة إلى) vs. dialectal counterparts.",
    "Negation Patterns: Checking for 'ma...sh' (Egypt/Maghreb) vs. 'lam/lan' (MSA) vs. 'mish' (Levant).",
    "Suffix/Prefix Mapping: Identifying 'ha' (future) vs. 'sa' (MSA) and 'ya' (vocative) usage.",
    "Lexical Density: Measuring the ratio of dialect-specific slang to formal vocabulary.",
    "Code-Switching: Detecting frequency of English/French loanwords to determine 'Elite/Urban' vs 'Traditional' register.",
    "Purity Check: Flagging 'hybrid slop' where multiple dialects are accidentally mixed without intent."
  ],
  "pack_path": ".cursor/skills/content/register-detection/"
}
```
